title: S25073069 - Device42 On-Prem Software Licensing Agreement
name: S25073069 - Device42 On-Prem Software Licensing Agreement
statement_of_work: California State Parks seeks to procure Device42 software licenses. Please refer to the attached Event package for bid submission instructions.
deliverables: Execute scope of work described in the S25073069 - Device42 On-Prem Software Licensing Agreement solicitation
Deliver milestones, status reporting, and acceptance documentation
Provide final handoff and post-deployment support per RFP terms
dept: California Department of Parks and Recreation
description:
California State Parks seeks to procure Device42 software licenses. Please refer to the attached Event package for bid submission instructions.

Questions regarding this Event must be submitted in writing to the Procurement Official specified on the Event package cover page, per the instructions outlined in the Event package.

Click on the View Event Package button for Event package attachment.
